generated_oml:
// C17: Insights/Actions
instance LiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visualization of speed, steering angle, object tracks and projected path"
]

instance DesiredSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Desired speed computed by the ACC control model"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time‑series report generated after a run for post‑run analysis"
]

instance AdjustACCParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator adjusts ACC desired speed or enable/disable flag",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic = false
]

instance TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator triggers emergency braking",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic = false
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI visualizes real‑time vehicle state, object tracks and projected path, generates reports",
    DTDFVocab:provides = LiveVisualizationInsight,
    DTDFVocab:provides = ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC algorithm runs in the DT and returns desired speed to the vehicle",
    DTDFVocab:provides = DesiredSpeedInsight,
    DTDFVocab:provides = AdjustACCParametersAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operator can enable/disable ACC, adjust desired speed and trigger emergency braking via UI",
    DTDFVocab:provides = AdjustACCParametersAction,
    DTDFVocab:provides = TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction
]

// C11: Enablers (core)
instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS 2 middleware handling ROS topics over Wi‑Fi",
    DTDFVocab:enables = DataMonitoringService,
    DTDFVocab:enables = ComputationOffloadingService,
    DTDFVocab:enables = RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing pipeline (DBSCAN + Kalman) for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:enables = ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ModelProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes ACC model and other analytics",
    DTDFVocab:enables = ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3‑D UI framework rendering live visualizations",
    DTDFVocab:enables = DataMonitoringService
]

instance StorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database engine for persistent storage of ego state, tracks and reports",
    DTDFVocab:enables = DataMonitoringService
]

// C12: Enablers (tooling & SDKs)
instance Python38Runtime : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 runtime used by ROS nodes",
    DTDFVocab:enables = ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance CppNodeLifecycle : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ ROS 2 node lifecycle management",
    DTDFVocab:enables = ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkToolkit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink used for clustering and tracking algorithms",
    DTDFVocab:enables = DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetPackEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA JetPack 5.0 SDK on Jetson devices",
    DTDFVocab:enables = ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance DBSCANAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm implementation",
    DTDFVocab:enables = DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter algorithm implementation",
    DTDFVocab:enables = DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance UI3DFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3‑D visualization framework powering the operator UI",
    DTDFVocab:enables = DataMonitoringService
]

instance StandardizedCommInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized communication interface as required by R1",
    DTDFVocab:enables = ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

// C10: Models
instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control model compliant with ISO 15622 (lead‑vehicle identification and speed calculation)",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo = ModelProcessingEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for LiDAR point‑clouds",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo = DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracking of clustered objects",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo = DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance Visualization3DModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3‑D visualization model used by the UI",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo = VisualizationEnabler
]

instance ReportingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reporting model for generating time‑series analysis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo = StorageEnabler
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST‑110LX LiDAR providing point‑cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData = LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera delivering depth images",
    DTDFVocab:producedData = DepthImageTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor used to generate ego‑state information",
    DTDFVocab:producedData = SpeedTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering‑angle sensor used to generate ego‑state information",
    DTDFVocab:producedData = SteeringAngleTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (Data transmitted)
instance LiDARPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom = HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom = IntelDepthCamera
]

instance SpeedTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom = VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom = SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom = LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]

// C5: Data
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [

]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image data generated by the Intel D435i camera",
    DTDFVocab:fromData = DepthImageTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo = ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance SpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed measurement",
    DTDFVocab:fromData = SpeedTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo = ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle measurement",
    DTDFVocab:fromData = SteeringAngleTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo = ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance EgoStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived ego‑state (speed + steering angle) used by ACC algorithm",
    DTDFVocab:fromData = SpeedTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo = ModelProcessingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks produced from LiDAR clustering and Kalman filtering",
    DTDFVocab:fromData = LiDARPointCloudTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo = ModelProcessingEnabler
]

instance ReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series report data generated after a run",
    DTDFVocab:fromData = ObjectTracksTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo = StorageEnabler
]

instance MotorVoltageCommandInterface : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor voltage command interface for vehicle propulsion"
]

instance SteeringServoActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering‑servo actuation interface"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Outbound commands from the Digital Twin Entity to the Physical Twin Entity including desired speed set‑points for the motor, enable/disable ACC, emergency‑brake command and other remote‑management actions, sent over ROS 2 and Wi‑Fi and applied by the Actuation Functional Entity."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation with end‑to‑end network latency bounded to ≤100 ms (requirement R7) and distributed clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms (requirement R8)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity‑based architecture derived from ISO 23247: Physical Twin Entity hosts sensors and actuators, Digital Twin Entity provides data collection, ACC controlling, reporting and presentation, User Entity supplies 3D visualization and control‑panel UI, Cross‑System Entity performs data translation; components are connected via ROS 2 intra‑entity and Wi‑Fi inter‑entity links."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design‑time (simulation‑based cyber‑physical experimentation), development/testing (ROS 2 package integration), deployment (cloud‑hosted DT services), and operational phase (runtime monitoring, remote management, and data logging)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "High‑fidelity perception through LiDAR point‑cloud clustering (DBSCAN) and Kalman filtering; validation of ACC behavior against ISO 15622 performance class I; latency ≤100 ms and clock sync 100 ms ensure temporal fidelity; safety‑critical nature addressed by respecting these timing constraints."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication over a Wi‑Fi network using ROS 2 topics; data serialization and unit conversion performed by the Data Translation Functional Entity; standardized interfaces ensure modularity and loose coupling (requirement R1)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity runs on external compute (e.g., cloud or separate workstation) as ROS 2 packages; Physical Twin Entity executes on the vehicle‑mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; User Entity UI runs on an operator workstation; Cross‑System Entity resides on the same network facilitating data translation."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework) reference architecture and employs ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; ISO/IEC 30173 concepts are acknowledged, and OPC UA is mentioned as an optional protocol for data translation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety is addressed by imposing a maximum 100 ms network latency and 100 ms clock synchronization, and by complying with ISO 15622 ACC specifications; no explicit security mechanisms (e.g., authentication, encryption) are described."
]
